source_description: Sanitized HTML search/toc/content trio migrated from legacy Reader-Core samples/fixtures/html/sample_001_*.html. Exercises CSS list-item text splitting on a pipe delimiter (name|url pattern), CSS class selectors (#results, .item, #chapters, .chapter, .content), and a content rule targeting a single .content div. The chapter content uses public-domain-style phrasing (三国演义 opening) with a synthetic tail sentence.
sanitization: All URLs neutralized from http://fixture.local to https://books.example.test. Book titles (书剑恩仇录, 天龙八部) are kept as recognizable public-domain work titles for parity testing; chapter text is a public-domain opening + synthetic addition. No real domain, no credentials, no copyrighted long text, no scripts.

privacy_check.notes: Migrated from clean synthetic sample; URLs neutralized to example.test. No credentials or private data.
